{
  "version": "2.0.0",
  "tasks": [
    {
      "label": "Custom C++ Build Task",
      "type": "shell",
      "command": "clang++",
      "args": [
        "-g",
        "${file}",
        "-o",
        "${workspaceFolder}/${fileBasenameNoExtension}"
      ],
      "group": "build"
    }
    // {
    //   "label": "Custom C++ Clean Task",
    //   "type": "shell",
    //   "command": "rm",
    //   "args": [
    //     "-rf",
    //     "${workspaceFolder}/main",
    //     "${workspaceFolder}/main.dSYM"
    //   ],
    //   "presentation": { "reveal": "silent" }
    // }
  ]
}


{
  // Use IntelliSense to learn about possible attributes.
  // Hover to view descriptions of existing attributes.
  // For more information, visit: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=830387
  "version": "0.2.0",
  "configurations": [
    {
      "name": "Build, Run, and Debug C++",
      // vscode microsoft extension
      "type": "cppdbg",
      "request": "launch",
      "program": "${workspaceFolder}/${fileBasenameNoExtension}",
      // stop debugger at main
      "stopAtEntry": true,
      "cwd": "${fileDirname}",
      "externalConsole": false,
      "MIMode": "lldb",
      // custom task to run before launching debugger
      // ensures we have the `main` executable
      "preLaunchTask": "Custom C++ Build Task"
    }
    // {
    //   "name": "Run and Debug C++",
    //   "type": "cppdbg",
    //   "request": "launch",
    //   "program": "${workspaceFolder}/${fileBasenameNoExtension}",
    //   "stopAtEntry": true,
    //   "cwd": "${fileDirname}",
    //   "MIMode": "lldb"
    // }
  ]
}

ranslationUnitDecl
|- TypedefDecl __int128_t '__int128' (implicit)
|  `- BuiltinType '__int128'
|- TypedefDecl __uint128_t 'unsigned __int128' (implicit)
|  `- BuiltinType 'unsigned __int128'
|- TypedefDecl __NSConstantString '__NSConstantString_tag' (implicit)
|  `- RecordType '__NSConstantString_tag'
|     `- CXXRecord '__NSConstantString_tag'
|- TypedefDecl __builtin_ms_va_list 'char *' (implicit)
|  `- PointerType 'char *'
|     `- BuiltinType 'char'
|- TypedefDecl __builtin_va_list '__va_list_tag[1]' (implicit)
|  `- ConstantArrayType '__va_list_tag[1]' size=1
|     `- RecordType '__va_list_tag'
|        `- CXXRecord '__va_list_tag'
`- FunctionDecl main 'int ()'
   `- CompoundStmt
      `- DeclStmt
         `- VarDecl a 'int' cinit
            `- IntegerLiteral 123


 {
  "tasks": [
    {
      "type": "cppbuild",
      "label": "C/C++: clang++ build active file",
      "command": "/usr/bin/clang++",
      "args": [
        "-fcolor-diagnostics",
        "-fansi-escape-codes",
        // "-g",
        "${file}",
        "-o",
        "${fileDirname}/${fileBasenameNoExtension}",
        "-std=c++11",
        "-Wall",
        "-Werror",
        "&&",
        "./${fileBasenameNoExtension}"
      ],
      "options": {
        "cwd": "${fileDirname}"
      },
      "problemMatcher": ["$gcc"],
      "group": {
        "kind": "build",
        "isDefault": true
      },
      "detail": "Task generated by Debugger."
    }
  ],
  "version": "2.0.0"
}
